spell.jjkdomains.infinite_void.desc: Opens the Domain Expansion: Infinite Void. All players within range are rendered completely immobile, flooded with infinite information they cannot process.
spell.jjkdomains.malevolent_shrine.desc: Opens the Domain Expansion: Malevolent Shrine. Dismembering slashes tear through all players within the domain, dealing continuous cutting damage.
spell.jjkdomains.deadly_sentencing.desc: Opens the Domain Expansion: Deadly Sentencing. All players are brought before the court. The judge renders a verdict — GUILTY grants the caster a single death blow sword and drains all mana from the condemned.
spell.jjkdomains.coffin_of_iron_mountain: Opens the Domain Expansion: Coffin of the Iron Mountain. Scorching heat and crushing pressure deals massive fire damage and inflicts Weakness on all players within the domain. Fire Resistance negates all effects.
